title: Manufacturing Engineer - Su-Kam Power Systems Asia Pacific Associates - Apply Now
company: Su-Kam Power Systems Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Su-Kam Power Systems Asia Pacific Associates - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Su-Kam Power Systems Asia Pacific Associates has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Surat office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Su-Kam Power Systems Asia Pacific Associates:
Su-Kam Power Systems Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Su-Kam Power Systems Asia Pacific Associates!
